en.help_intelligence_summary: Memory Map uses your saved review outcomes when available. New/Weak = little or no successful recall; Needs review/Fading = previously learned but due or recently missed; Strong = repeated successful recall and not yet due. If you have no review history yet, Mnemosyne shows a recency-based fallback until drills/checks are recorded.
